name: Beeline Holdings, Inc.
summary: Beeline Holdings, Inc. (the Company) was incorporated under the laws of Nevada in 2004. On March 12, 2025, the Company changed its name from Eastside Distilling, Inc. (Eastside) to Beeline Holdings, Inc., reflecting the Companys current operations and focus as a fintech mortgage lender, fractional equity purchase facilitator and title provider.
